The '''[[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani]] Exchange''' was a building located in the commercial district of [[Estalle Island]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]] and was the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] primary financial center. Shares in [[Expanse]] companies were traded at the Tapani exchange as well futures in raw materials and food. Ore futures were some of the most actively traded commodities.
